title: Revert "Default CPUShares in Inspect are 1024"
body:
cpu-share is 0 in docker inspect, see for more details
https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/35452

This reverts commit eb229d526c04f17ca8b7e65abba745fd5b465a6c.

Signed-off-by: Sagi Shnaidman <sshnaidm@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *sshnaidm* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Might need a rebase, I'm seeing flakes that we've fixed on master

@mheon I checked out from master. From now `Current branch cpushare is up to date`
it's only one change in file in commit
Hm. Seems to have gone green since then, so we're good.
